title: Senior Teacher - Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd!
